entries.name: virtue-driven
entries.definition: A Classical Greek Philosophy Governor leads through virtue, reason, and the pursuit of excellence, balancing ethical principles with practical wisdom while fostering human flourishing in all endeavors.

ethical_principles: Virtue and character excellence in all actions
Reason and wisdom guide decisions
Seek the golden mean between extremes
Foster human flourishing and eudaimonia
